description_of_development: To construct exterior and interior alterations to a General Industrial building (new overhead door and ramp).
To construct an accessibility ramp, and to amend the approved Landscape Plan approved in Development Permit 563057026-002 (Italian Centre Warehouse).

To remove the approved Restaurant with plaza and to construct exterior alterations to an existing Public Park (including platform lookout structures, stair links, accessible ramps and added trails). (Revision to issued Development Permit number 165762771-001).

To Change the Use of a Portion of a General Industrial Use to an Indoor Participant Recreation Service (Fitness Ninja) and add Accessory Health Service and Construct Exterior Alterations (Removal of Outdoor Ramp and new Rear Stairs)
To construct exterior alterations to an existing Private Clubs Use building (re-construct landing with temporary hand railing and concrete block retaining wall). (THE ORANGE HALL)

To construct exterior and interior alterations to the Iron Works Building, including the North and South Annex (Building rehabilitation and renovation, including barrier-free access ramp) [no land uses approved in this Development Permit]

To construct an addition and exterior alterations to a Professional, Financial, and Office Support building (Yellowhead Tribal Council AOSA Centre, add an elevator addition and redesign existing stair tower combined with the new elevator).
To Construct an Exterior Alterations to a Minor Industrial Building (New Ramp and Overhead Door)
To construct interior and exterior alterations to an existing Religious Assembly (adding front wheelchair lift).

To construct an addition to a General Retail Stores building, add the use of a Restaurant (133.2 sq.m. public space), and construct interior and exterior alterations (create barrier-free parking spaces and change parking lot design). (Zoning Bylaw 20001 equivalent: Indoor Sales and Service, and Food and Drink Service)
To construct exterior alterations to a General Industrial building (new overhead door and concrete ramp)
To construct interior alterations inside an Indoor Participant Recreation Service space (barrier free washroom and kitchenette, land use not declared in this application)
To replace panels on (2) existing Freestanding On-premises Sign (Lifting Solutions)
To construct exterior alterations to a General Industrial Use building (exterior door on west elevation, overhead door and ramp on east elevation, building F, see DP 416126043-002).

description_of_development: To operate a General Retail Store and construct exterior (new doors and ramp) and interior alterations.

(Industrial Health Lab)

To construct exterior alterations to the Site to redevelop the south outdoor plaza area and exterior alterations to the east and west pavilions that are Accessory and adjacent to the Public Libraries and Cultural Exhibits Use (Stanley A. Milner Library); to include re-development and re-design of the Post Office Clock Tower Plaza Site and Judy Padua Way (Road-Right-of-Way); and to construct exterior alterations and to change the Use to Child Care Services to the existing stage and amphitheater on top of the Parkade Exit Ramp on 101A Avenue NW to support the required rooftop outdoor play space for the Child Care Services Use Accessory to the Stanley A. Milner Library; and exterior alterations to the Entry Ramp and Pedestrian Stairwell on 100 Street and some tree removals and new trees on Road-Right-Of-Way. This includes the raising of Judy Padua Way to become a shared roadway and removal of the turning loop from 99 Street North. (Centennial Plaza)
